_comment: Merge these flat keys into client/public/locales/en/translation.json, then translate copies into es-MX/translation.json and zh-CN/translation.json. The chat agent already replies in the user's detected language at runtime; these keys localize the static UI chrome (buttons, placeholders, notices). The {{page}}, {{d}}, {{f}} are i18next interpolations — keep them.
chat.subtitle: Ask questions, build charts, and create temporary pages
chat.notConfigured: Data Chat is not configured yet — an OpenRouter API key (OPENROUTER_API_KEY) must be set in Coolify.
chat.empty: Talk to the data. Ask a question, request a chart, or have me build a page.
chat.suggest.1: Revenue by channel for 2025 as a bar chart
chat.suggest.2: Who are the top 10 customers by total order value?
chat.suggest.3: Build a summary landing page for last quarter
chat.recoverFailed: Couldn't recover automatically. Your answer is saved — reopen this chat from history in a moment.
chat.connLost: Connection lost before the chat started — please resend.
temp.notFound: This page has expired or doesn’t exist.
temp.refinePlaceholder: Refine this dashboard… e.g. "only last 30 days" or "only Texas"
